## Need

What adoption-management problem are you trying to solve?

## Proposed Change

Describe the behavior you want.

## Boundaries

Does this belong in generic ADOP or a project-local overlay?

## Evidence

List the trial flow, checklist gap, or artifact problem that motivated this request.
